meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Finish Your SaaS Project Faster (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use this intermediate guide to design with AI, leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your MVP faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: To overcome project paralysis, shift from manual coding to AI-orchestrated design. By combining Antigravity for rapid UI prototyping and Claude Code for iterative backend logic, you bypass the 'blank page' syndrome. This workflow turns architectural constraints into actionable code, ensuring your MVP reaches market validation before your momentum fades.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You start with a vision, code the auth, get stuck on a complex data schema, and suddenly, the project sits in a GitHub repo gathering digital dust. The friction between your ambition and the execution phase is where most founders lose their edge.

But the game has changed. By treating AI not as a chatbot, but as an architectural partner, you can collapse months of development into focused, high-velocity sprints. This is about precision engineering—using Antigravity to crystallize your design intent and Claude Code to execute the heavy lifting. It is time to stop building in circles and start shipping for revenue.

steps.title: Define the Atomic MVP Scope
steps.description: Narrow your scope to the single core feature that generates revenue. Prevent feature creep by defining exact success metrics before writing a line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition for [Insert SaaS Idea]. Outline a lean MVP schema focusing strictly on the 'happy path' for user conversion. Exclude secondary features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap JSON document based on the atomic scope defined in Antigravity.'

steps.title: Generate High-Fidelity Design Tokens
steps.description: Use AI to transform your business logic into actionable UI tokens, ensuring design consistency from day one without manual styling overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Tailwind CSS color palette and typography system aligned with a professional SaaS aesthetic. Provide the configuration as a JSON file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate the generated theme tokens into the tailwind.config.js and verify accessibility standards.'

steps.title: Architect the Database Schema
steps.description: Let AI handle the relational complexity. By defining your data structure early, you avoid costly refactors later in the development cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for [Insert SaaS Idea] using PostgreSQL. Include indexing for high-frequency queries and ensure user-centric data isolation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and execute the Prisma schema migration based on the provided database design.'

steps.title: Rapid Component Synthesis
steps.description: Convert design intent into functional components. This step focuses on speed-to-screen, allowing you to see your app come to life in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular React component for the main dashboard view. Use TypeScript, include error handling, and ensure responsive layout patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the component files, add basic unit tests, and integrate into the main app route.'

steps.title: Automated Logic Integration
steps.description: Connect your frontend to the backend logic. Use Claude Code to automate the boilerplate of API routes and data fetching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the API route logic to handle [Insert Core Function] with validation and error logging. Ensure secure data handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the API endpoint and verify connectivity with the existing database schema.'

pro_tips: Treat your prompts like PRDs; the more context you provide about your target user, the better the AI architecture will perform.
Use Claude Code to write 'self-healing' scripts that automatically run linting and type-checking before every commit.
Always validate your AI-generated database schema against real-world constraints before running migrations; AI can sometimes over-engineer relationships.
Maintain a 'master prompt' file in your repo that defines your coding style, naming conventions, and preferred library stack to keep AI outputs consistent.
When a feature stalls, ask the AI to 'break the problem into 5-minute sub-tasks'—this psychological trick resets momentum instantly.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, collect feedback from three potential users, and iterate on the core conversion funnel based on actual usage data.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in the editor. Leverage these tools to build, ship, and scale your vision with the efficiency of a senior engineering team. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
